etymology.description: Depicts two entangled ropes -> to entangle; to intertwine -> Original form of 糾(糾) (jiū, "correct")
etymology.interpretation: The character 丩(丩) (jiū, "twist") visually resembles two intertwined ropes, symbolizing the idea of twisting or entangling. It is an ancient form that emphasizes the physical act of twisting or binding something together.
